features: Men energy: Works as a body, hair and face wash. Our energy shower gel has been specially designed to care for your skin after training to refresh your skin
Mint extract: The shower gel your skin deserves: our shower gel cleansing wash has a refreshing masculine mint fragrance to revive your body after sport
All-in-1: The men's shower gel is a perfect all round product so there is no need to bring three bottles to the gym. Feel revitalised with Energy Shower Gel
To apply: Simply dispense the desired amount of our NIVEA MEN Energy men's body wash onto your palm and massage directly onto wet hair or skin
Skin balanced: pH Skin Balanced formula so the gel is kind on your skin. Skin compatibility dermatologically approved. Suitable for body, face and hair
description: NIVEA Men Shower Gel Energy ‚Äì the ultimate energising skincare experiece  Face every day with energy: NIVEA MEN Energy Shower Gel with energizing mint extract and a fresh masculine scent refreshes the skin, providing men with energy and freshness. The all-in-1 shower gel means you can wash your hair, body and face simply and effectively with just one product. It cares for hair and skin, giving it long-lasting freshness. How to apply: Simply squeeze the desired amount onto your palm, lather it up and massage into wet hair/skin and then rinse. Formulated with a light, masculine scent, the gel removes excess oils, grease and any residual styling product from your hair and skin.  Product benefits:  Masculine scent Suitable for body, face and hair pH Skin Balanced Energising skincare experience
